channel.title: Goldman Sachs Asset Management Insights
channel.description: GSAM insights feed built from the official search JSON and rewritten to local item pages for better reader compatibility.

item.title: Active ETF Due Diligence: A Combination of Art and Science
item.description: Due diligence in the active ETF market is both an art and a science. We provide answers to some of our clients’ most frequently asked questions about the process.

item.title: Market Monitor
item.description: Stay connected with our Weekly Market Monitor, featuring a thematic chart, key market developments, and valuable investment insights across asset classes each week.

item.title: Fixed Income Outlook 2Q 2026
item.description: Geopolitical risk, sticky inflation and AI-driven disruption are creating new challenges and selective opportunities across global fixed income markets.

item.title: Municipal Quarterly Review 1Q 2026
item.description: Active management remains critical for muni investors in 2026. Heavy supply, Fed rate uncertainty, and seasonal volatility create opportunities for credit selection and duration positioning to capture tax-equivalent income amid technical headwinds.

item.title: The Next Phase of AI is Rewiring the Enterprise Software Stack
item.description: Breakthroughs in large language models have enabled the development of autonomous AI, transforming the software, apps and technology architecture organizations rely on. We explore how the enterprise stack is changing.

item.title: Off the Beaten Path: Private Capital Transforming the Health of Rural America
item.description: Millions of Americans face rural healthcare challenges. This situation underscores the need for innovative solutions, with private equity positioned to provide the capital, operational expertise, and strategic guidance to improve patient outcomes.

item.title: The Future is Now for Investing in Economic Security
item.description: Economic security is now a global priority. Supply chain, resource, and national security are top of mind, and we see potential investment opportunities.

item.title: Market Know-How 2Q 2026
item.description: In a world of macro and political uncertainty, we see ample prospects for investors to turn macro challenges into potential investment opportunities.

item.title: Market Pulse April
item.description: What does the conflict in the Middle East mean for markets? The impact will ultimately depend on the duration and severity of the energy disruption, but we still see potential opportunities across global equity and fixed income markets today.

item.title: Corporate Pension Monthly
item.description: Corporate Pension Monthly reflects the latest estimate of aggregate corporate defined benefit funded status, asset class returns, and notable news.

item.title: Unlocking Alpha Potential in Inefficient Markets With Data-Powered Models
item.description: Passive strategies and retail investing are altering the structure of equity markets. We asked Osman Ali, global co-head of QIS, what investors need to know to manage the risks and identify the opportunities in this evolving market.

item.title: Prepaid Gas Bonds: Unlocking Yield in a Growing Municipal Sector
item.description: Discover why the rapid growth of prepaid gas bonds is reshaping municipal indices and creating a compelling source of intermediate term yield.

item.title: 2026 Global Insurance Survey
item.description: The 15th annual Global Insurance Survey delivers insights from 434 Chief Investment Officers (CIOs) and Chief Financial Officers (CFOs) representing insurers that collectively manage approximately half of global industry balance sheet assets. Explore our comprehensive assessment of the macroeconomic environment, asset allocation trends, and the evolving industry landscape.

item.title: An Evolving Liquidity Landscape
item.description: Discover how transferability, yield, and new exit routes are enhancing liquidity in GP stakes investments.

item.title: Learnings from Earnings
item.description: We highlight key learnings from the 4Q 2025 earnings season including robust mega-cap earnings, expectations for significant artificial intelligence capital expenditure, deliberate choices by consumers, and divergence across regions.

item.title: CIO Digest
item.description: Every quarter, CIOs across our Public Investing teams gather to discuss the forces reshaping global markets and the opportunities they create, which we summarize in this CIO Digest.

item.title: Pension Review First Take
item.description: In its 24th year, the Pension Review “First Take” analyzes the 50 largest US Defined Benefit (DB) plans in the S&P 500 based on asset values to review the factors that impacted corporate DB plan sponsors in 2025 and share potential trends for 2026.

item.title: Municipal Fixed Income Monthly
item.description: Explore our latest insights what happened over the last month in the fixed income municipal market.

item.title: The Fed’s Balance Sheet: What Does it Mean for Money Markets?
item.description: The nomination of Kevin Warsh to Chair the Federal Reserve (Fed) has brought the US central bank’s balance sheet into focus for investors. We take a closer look at the current path of the Fed’s balance sheet policy and how a Warsh-led Fed could reshape it.

item.title: Taking The Keys: Insights On The European Private Credit Market
item.description: Our analysis of major credit events in European private credit over the past decade reveals insights about the market and implications for LPs.

item.title: Game Changer: Investing in Women and Sports
item.description: Download the full publication for more on the burgeoning industry, building leaders, and how financial advisors can help.

item.title: Market Brief: Investment Perspectives on the Middle East Conflict
item.description: Our Public Investing leadership team outlined key investment observations and potential implications for equity and fixed income markets at the onset of the geopolitical developments in the Middle East.

item.title: US Small Caps: A Big Case for Broadening Equity Exposure
item.description: Discover why we believe US Small Caps present a compelling investment opportunity in 2026, driven by robust growth and earnings.

item.title: Gaining an Active Edge in Investment Grade Credit
item.description: IG credit investors have opportunities to look beyond passive benchmarks, strategically position for spread widening, and actively manage AI-related issuance.

item.title: Emerging Market Equities: AI, China, and India in Focus
item.description: Emerging markets (EMs) exceeded expectations in 2025 and are poised for continued momentum. We believe AI, China, and India are key areas that offer opportunities in 2026 for active investors able to navigate the diverse landscape.

item.title: Plan Sponsor Survey 2026
item.description: In our annual Retirement Survey & Insights Report, our participant-focused research has consistently identified competing financial priorities as a growing reality making retirement savings affordability a central concern for savers.

item.title: Exploring the New Generation of Retirement
item.description: As the cost of living continues to rise alongside increased life expectancy, there is a growing demand for innovative approaches to retirement savings and planning. Progress is being driven by strategic collaborations among financial advisors, asset managers, insurance companies and technology providers. These developments are expected to enhance the financial security of Americans as they prepare for the future.

item.title: Green Bond Market Guide
item.description: In our Green Bond Market Guide, we provide a comprehensive market overview and explain how green bonds can complement a fixed income portfolio.

item.title: Technology in 2026: Dispersion, Diversification, and AI's Expanding Frontier
item.description: The tech landscape is being redefined by rapid AI innovation. In our view, selectivity among hyperscalers and diversification across AI infrastructure, data and security, and consumer tech will be key to capturing potential opportunities.

item.title: From Defense to Offense: Finding the True Value of Tail-Risk Hedging
item.description: Our analysis shows that tail-risk hedging should not be viewed as a standalone return generator. Its real power stems from enabling more risk-taking in core assets, like equities, which can potentially boost long-term portfolio returns.

item.title: 2026 US Corporate Pension Review and Preview
item.description: We believe the corporate defined benefit (DB) system faces a new tipping point in its role in the American retirement system, poised between potentially further decline and revitalization through policy and design changes.

item.title: Market Brief: Venezuela, Geopolitical Flashpoints and Investment Implications
item.description: Geopolitical flashpoints, most notably events in Venezuela, have dominated headlines at the start of 2026. We share our observations on potential oil market impacts and considerations for equity and bond investors.

item.title: Japanese Equities Offer Potential Opportunities for Alpha Enhanced Investing
item.description: Here are five questions on Japanese equities we think investors should consider in 2026.

item.title: What are the Key Themes for Munis in 2026?
item.description: Discover our municipal bond outlook for 2026: tax-exempt income, elevated supply, and credit selectivity may help guide investment strategy into the new year.

item.title: Rethinking Resources: How Circular Economy Investments Offer Diversification, Resilience, and Growth
item.description: Discover how investing in the circular economy can unlock new growth, diversification, and resilience for your portfolio—beyond the headlines.

item.title: How Quant Strategies Drive the Alpha Enhanced Approach to Equity Investing
item.description: We believe an Alpha Enhanced approach to equity investing requires a versatile security-selection strategy capable of seeking alpha while controlling risk. In our view, a systematic, data-driven process is the most efficient way to implement this approach.

item.title: Municipal Bonds: Navigating Easing Cycles for Enhanced Returns
item.description: The municipal credit market has faced its fair share of headwinds this year, but we believe there are plenty of reasons to be optimistic.

item.title: Navigating the Nuances Across Public Markets in 2026
item.description: What’s in store for stocks and bonds in 2026? Our Investment Outlook highlights potential ways investors can navigate complexity and seek catalysts across public markets.

item.title: Exploring Alternative Dimensions Across Private Markets in 2026
item.description: What’s ahead for alternatives in 2026? Our Investment Outlook addresses key questions across private equity, private credit, real estate and infrastructure that may inform outcomes for existing portfolio assets and guide future capital deployment.

item.title: Shifting Paradigms for Portfolio Construction in 2026
item.description: Our Investment Outlook highlights potential ways investors can unlock catalysts across public and private markets. How should investors think about recalibrating portfolios in 2026—from active ETFs to alternatives?

item.title: Investment Outlook 2026: Seeking Catalysts Amid Complexity
item.description: Our Investment Outlook for 2026—Seeking Catalysts Amid Complexity—highlights potential drivers of returns across public and private markets. Explore our views on the investment backdrop, asset class opportunities, and portfolio construction themes.

item.title: Staying Active Amid Complexity in 2026
item.description: We consider conditions that could pull economies and markets in different directions. We also explore catalysts, like AI and dealmaking momentum, that may unlock value in portfolios and create new opportunities.

item.title: Evolving Thematic Landscapes and Megatrends in 2026
item.description: Our Investment Outlook highlights potential ways investors can unlock catalysts across public and private markets. How could energy transition, growing power demand and shifting trade dynamics create new investment opportunities?

item.title: The $100 Trillion Elephant in the Room: High Debt and Wide Deficits
item.description: Successive global crises have propelled public debt past $100 trillion. In this article, we explore government strategies to address immense fiscal pressures and how investors can navigate elevated debt and persistent deficits.

item.title: How Active ETFs May Enhance High Yield Bond Investing
item.description: We believe active ETFs in the high yield space have proven to be a game-changer. Investors accessing high yield bond markets via active ETFs can enjoy the benefits of potentially accessing greater income through a liquid, transparent and market-efficient vehicle.

item.title: 2025 Alternatives Summit: Navigating a World in Flux
item.description: The 2025 Alternatives Summit convened leaders across finance, geopolitics, technology, and culture to discuss major themes shaping global markets. We’ve synthesized key insights shared by our influential speakers.

item.title: Beyond the Beta: Actively Seeking Small-Cap Alpha
item.description: Rate cuts, strong earnings, attractive valuations, and dealmaking create a compelling backdrop for small-cap equities globally. While conditions are supportive, skilled active management is key to turning these tailwinds into superior returns.

item.title: Riding the Tide: The Strengthening Case for Emerging Markets Debt
item.description: A more-favorable macro environment, alongside improving economic fundamentals in many countries, are creating opportunities within the potentially underallocated emerging market debt universe.

item.title: Taking Control of Hidden Risks in Passive Sustainable Equity Strategies
item.description: Passive sustainable-investing strategies can carry hidden active risks. An Alpha Enhanced solution is designed to help bring transparency, control, adaptability and potentially improved risk-adjusted returns.

item.title: Boosting the Efficiency of Core Equity Allocations with an Alpha Enhanced Approach
item.description: An Alpha Enhanced approach allows investors to make more efficient use of their portfolio risk budget by combining the cost effectiveness and predictability of passive equity strategies with the risk management and alpha potential of an active approach.
